channel.title: Kali on Aaron's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kali on Aaron's Blog

item.title: Pi Homelab — Voltron and Pi5Desktop
item.description: Two Raspberry Pi 5s on Tailscale. Pi5Security (Voltron): Kali Linux, n8n, Grafana, Kismet, Fail2Ban. Pi5Desktop: Ollama (Llama 3.2), Cowrie honeypot, Igris Claude-Code Slack bot. Both hardened: SSH key-only, port 2222, Fail2Ban.
